Bash(cd D:/QitekShop/backend && python -c "
import subprocess, time, sys

proc = subprocess.Popen\([sys.executable, '-m', 'uvicorn', 'app.main:app', '--port', '8000'], cwd='D:/QitekShop/backend'\)
time.sleep\(3\)
try:
    import requests
    r = requests.post\('http://localhost:8000/api/auth/login', json={'username':'admin','password':'admin123'}\)
    print\('Login:', r.status_code, r.json\(\)\)
    if r.status_code == 200:
        token = r.json\(\)['access_token']
        r2 = requests.get\('http://localhost:8000/api/auth/me', headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}'}\)
        print\('Me:', r2.status_code, r2.json\(\)\)
except ImportError:
    print\('requests not installed, skipping HTTP test'\)
except Exception as e:
    print\('Error:', e\)
finally:
    proc.terminate\(\)
    proc.wait\(\)
" 2>&1)

from passlib.context import CryptContext

Bash(cd D:/QitekShop/backend && python -c "
from app.database import SessionLocal
from app.auth.models import User
db = SessionLocal\(\)
user = db.query\(User\).filter_by\(username='admin'\).first\(\)
if user:
    print\('Found user:', user.username, user.role, user.is_active\)
    print\('Hash:', user.password_hash\)
    from passlib.context import CryptContext
    pwd = CryptContext\(schemes=['bcrypt']\)
    print\('Verify admin123:', pwd.verify\('admin123', user.password_hash\)\)
else:
    print\('No admin user found!'\)
db.close\(\)
" 2>&1)
